LAW AND MOTION 302, ASSIGNEE K ELDER DBA GRANITE FINANCIAL'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT ORDER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. UPON A NOTICED MOTION, THE COURT MAY ORDER THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR TO ASSIGN TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR ALL OR PART OF A RIGHT TO PAYMENT DUE OR TO BECOME DUE, WHETHER OR NOT THE RIGHT IS CONDITIONED ON FUTURE DEVELOPMENTS. (CCP 708.510(A).) CCP 1540 PERMITS AN ASSIGNEE JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO RECOVER UNCLAIMED PROPERTY THAT PREVIOUSLY ESCHEATED TO THE STATE. (WEINGARTEN REALTY INVESTORS V. CHIANG (2012) 212 CAL.APP.4TH 163, 168.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-30-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Assignment Order
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Frank V. Drummond, Esq. of Kirby & McGuinn, Tel. 619.398.3356, for assignee and moving party by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. ASSIGNEE K ELDER DBA GRANITE FINANCIAL'S Motion For Assignment Order is granted. No opposition filed. Upon a noticed motion, the court may order the judgment debtor to assign to the judgment creditor all or part of a right to payment due or to become due, whether or not the right is conditioned on future developments. (CCP 708.510(a).) CCP 1540 permits an assignee judgment creditor to recover unclaimed property that previously escheated to the State. (Weingarten Realty Investors v. Chiang (2012) 212 Cal.App.4th 163, 168.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
